Property owned by University of Connecticut. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-November.

Friends report that this is an edible apple tree and not a crabapple tree. I have not verified it.
Land owned by the University of Connecticut or Town of Mansfield. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-November.

Black walnut trees all along this stretch of Ravine Rd; location NOT exact due to the fact that I can't quite recall where the trees are (sorry). Best to try and harvest the walnuts at the exact moment they ripen, as squirrels and worms easily get to them firs
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Concord grapes are just off the road, along the entire stretch of Ravine Rd; location NOT exact due to the fact that grape vines move from year-to-year. Best way to find grapes is by smell: they will have an aroma of a deeper, richer grape soda/grape jelly.
